use_cases: Submitting forms with visual loading feedback during async operations
Triggering API calls that require loading state indication
Action buttons requiring disabled state during processing
Multi-step wizards or workflows with progress indication
ai_summary: A reusable loading button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, featuring multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Supports loading state with a spinning Loader2 icon, disabled state handling, and Radix-style asChild composition. Includes proper accessibility attributes like focus-visible ring styling and standard Tailwind CSS utility classes for consistent theming across any React application.
